title: Money Bank Notes
description: Are you tired of all Economy Plugins and virtual money on your server? Let me present you Money Bank Notes, ResourcePack which replaces textures of colored candles into real Bank Notes!
body:
![MONEY BANK NOTES LOGO](https://i.ibb.co/8r3xStz/Dizajn-bez-n-zvu-1.png)
---
Are you tired of all Economy Plugins and virtual money on your server? 

Let me present you Money Bank Notes, ResourcePack which replaces 
textures of colored candles into real Bank Notes!

## Candle Textures
- ![MONEY BANK NOTES LOGO](https://i.ibb.co/Mgd5sps/white-candle.png) 5 Cents = White Candle
- ![MONEY BANK NOTES LOGO](https://i.ibb.co/qrCvp9X/yellow-candle.png) 10 Cents = Yellow Candle
- ![MONEY BANK NOTES LOGO](https://i.ibb.co/c23sLZz/pink-candle.png) 20 Cents = Pink Candle
- ![MONEY BANK NOTES LOGO](https://i.ibb.co/Dz44wg0/orange-candle.png) 50 Cents = Orange Candle
- ![MONEY BANK NOTES LOGO](https://i.ibb.co/fq47p9G/magenta-candle.png) 1 Euro = Magenta Candle
- ![MONEY BANK NOTES LOGO](https://i.ibb.co/Jzjscn0/lime-candle.png) 2 Euro = Lime Candle
- ![MONEY BANK NOTES LOGO](https://i.ibb.co/vPw8mWx/light-gray-candle.png) 5 Euro = Light Gray Candle
- ![MONEY BANK NOTES LOGO](https://i.ibb.co/wKHjXKC/light-blue-candle.png) 10 Euro = Light Blue Candle
- ![MONEY BANK NOTES LOGO](https://i.ibb.co/YyCx196/gray-candle.png) 20 Euro = Gray Candle
- ![MONEY BANK NOTES LOGO](https://i.ibb.co/23byX6F/cyan-candle.png) 50 Euro = Cyan Candle
- ![MONEY BANK NOTES LOGO](https://i.ibb.co/Y22bGc8/blue-candle.png) 100 Euro = Blue Candle
- ![MONEY BANK NOTES LOGO](https://i.ibb.co/vYJ2j52/black-candle.png) 200 Euro = Black Candle
- ![MONEY BANK NOTES LOGO](https://i.ibb.co/vkq3WTF/purple-candle.png) 500 Euro = Purple Candle
- ![MONEY BANK NOTES LOGO](https://i.ibb.co/KKFP9fK/red-candle.png) 1 000 Euro = Red Candle
- ![MONEY BANK NOTES LOGO](https://i.ibb.co/f8CC8sm/green-candle.png) 2 000 Euro = Green Candle
- ![MONEY BANK NOTES LOGO](https://i.ibb.co/4465wZn/brown-candle.png) 5 000 Euro = Brown Candle


## FAQ

- ####  Where can i choose my language?
     You can choose your language in the game settings menu, in language section. ⚙️

- #### How much is 1€ in-game worth? 💸
     You can set your economy on your own, for easy understanding, by default 1€ in game is worth 1 Diamond.

- #### Best Addons for this ResourcePack? ⭐
     [LimitCrafting](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/limitcrafting-updated-1-19-disable-crafting-recipes.12962/) - Best plugin for disabling Crafting Money. **(Optional)**
